seo.title: NEEFT - Esport recruitment
seo.description: Create your profile, gain visibility, and find the players, staff, or teams that match your esport project.

hero.title: The gateway between talent and recruiting teams
hero.lead: NEEFT centralizes esport recruitment to help the right profiles meet the right organizations.

process.title: Recruit or get noticed in 3 steps

profile.title: Create your profile
profile.text: Clearly present your background, roles, games, goals, and what you are looking for on NEEFT.

visibility.title: Gain visibility
visibility.text: Appear in searches and give your profile a better chance of being seen at the right time.

action.title: Take action
action.text: Connect, apply, or move forward in your recruitment without wasting time across several platforms.

profiles.title: Complete profiles
profiles.text: Highlight your games, roles, experience, availability, and goals in a profile designed to be understood quickly.

search.title: Targeted search
search.text: Filter by game, role, level, availability, or profile type to directly reach the players, staff, or teams you care about.

recruitment.title: Recruitment posts
recruitment.text: Create a clear, visible, and targeted post to attract profiles that truly match your project.

applications.title: Direct applications
applications.text: Spot recruiting organizations and send your application directly from the platform.

messages.title: Integrated messaging
messages.text: Talk directly with the right contacts to validate interest, ask questions, or move recruitment forward.

visibility.title: Stronger visibility
visibility.text: Increase your visibility in the ecosystem and give your profile or organization a better chance of being noticed at the right time.

launch.title: Looking for a player, staff member, or team?
launch.lead: NEEFT lets you get straight to what matters and find the right contacts without wasting time.

player.title: Find a player
player.text: Access visible, available profiles ready to join a serious project.

staff.title: Find staff
staff.text: Find profiles that can structure, support, and help your organization progress.

team.title: Find a team
team.text: Identify recruiting organizations and join a project aligned with your ambition.
